# Shibili Aman TK
Full-Stack Developer & B.Tech CSE Student

Official portfolio of Shibili Aman TK, specializing in building scalable web solutions, developer tools, and automation scripts.

## Core Tech
- Python (Automation, AI Ops, Bot Development)
- JavaScript / TypeScript (React, Next.js, Astro)
- C++ (Systems, Performance)
- UI/UX (Figma, Prototyping)

## Key Projects
- Portfolio: High-performance Astro site with custom interactive "cheats".
- Secret Experiments: Ghost Deploy, PulseMap, HoneyRoute (available via site command).
